payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: But yeah, it closes June 24th, guys. This Friday at midnight. So go ahead and get them in; you got one more day for the most part, a little over a day to get those last entries in and we’ll announce those winners soon. Remember, you have to be 18 or older to enter, or you can have a guardian enter -

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: - and you’ll see what their next theme is, which will be nice.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You’re here, you’re still coming in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You were on time and you’re still somehow late.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Nobody told me that the show was starting.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So yeah. The links are in the chat. Check it out if you’re interested in signing up for Loot Crate. We hope to make it a little bit cheaper for you. So, there. We got that. The Critical Role t-shirt design contest has been live for a while.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: There are so many good pieces.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh man, so many good ones.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It’s going to be ridiculous. I’m not looking forward to having to choose.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, I know, it’s going to be tough.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: We got that set up. Next up, we have tomorrow, we have the next issue, release would we call it, of Dear Vox Machina. However, it is not necessarily a member of Vox Machina. This is one that I put together that I think you guys should enjoy. What character could it possibly be? I guess you’ll just have to check in tomorrow to find out. But that’ll be on geekandsundry.com tomorrow, I think around noon? Maybe earlier. I’ll tweet it out. You’ll find out on Geek & Sundry’s Twitter page, but -

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Lovely vibrant blue with a thing on the -

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: All of it, all of it goes to the charity.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, 100% of the proceeds go to -

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All the proceeds go to MDA.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Laura’s going to hula-hoop for three hours straight. You heard it here. Hold her to it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. And last on my end as far as announcements go, there will be no Critical Role official episode next Thursday because me and Marisha will be in Australia at the Haven Expo, so all you Aussies that want to come see us then, we’ll be out there doing panels and talks and meeting a bunch of you guys. It’ll be a lot of fun. However, while we will not be here, there will still be other members of our fantastic group here that are able to be here next week to put on whatever you decide to, that’s up to you guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We’re just going to hula-hoop for three hours.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It’ll be a surprise. It’s going to be great. We're going to draw on each others' faces with toothpaste.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: They’re going to do other things. I’m going to hula-hoop for three hours straight.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: To read your book, you're right, you are totally right. Well, I'm going to have you roll initiative, if you don't mind.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Is it a sports mascot? It's a sports mascot.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Not that I'd know. Anyway, let's go ahead and jump in this moment. As the rest of the party is sleeping soundly, I would like you, Vax'ildan -

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Remember, I said I was staying up to read my book.

payload.raw_text: All righty. Well, as you all wake up, the initiative round finishes as the attempted assassins do get their round on the three of you guys. So there is the one that is up against Keyleth right now is going to make two short sword attacks on you.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: So I will just say, "Come on Scanlan. Wake up! Wake up, man!" (all laugh)

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: No, it's a 7. It's a 7. That brings my initiative to 19.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: I mean, everything that you have would also include your armor, which you can't really put on right now. It would take you about a minute to put it on, as it is leather armor, but you can grab everything else if you wanted to. Or you could carry your armor awkwardly with you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 7 points of piercing damage and then I need you to make a constitution saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: There was some damage, though. It was what?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: An additional 7 points of poison damage. You used Uncanny Dodge on this. That all gets reduced to just 7 total.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So it would've been 14 total. You take it down to 7.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I lost track of what was what.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sorry. 7 points of piercing and 7 points of poison together would be 14. Your Uncanny Dodge brings it down to 7. So you just take 7 points of damage that round.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. That will end Hotis's turn. That brings us to Scanlan.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I'll use, I guess, some movement to gather my belongings and anything that I don't still have on.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: At the distance it is at that point and plus the fact that you have been there before, you concentrate, you remember a few nights you walked up there to look over the grounds because it's a beautiful view and it's close to where you guys usually stay here in the castle. (zoopf) You come out of the Dimension Door and looking before you, you can see Gilmore holding a dagger out to one side and Vax bleeding, holding and clutching the front of his abdomen, eyes darting around wildly, trying to think of some sort of plan for survival. So that's your action, that's most of your movement...

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll just grab a couple of instruments.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. (grabbing sound) You gather some things.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And go. I'll grab the shawm and the Mythcarver.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And if I've ever been up there, I'm going to try to Dimension Door to the west tower.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't know if I'm familiar enough with it, but I'll give it a shot.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. You would've walked through the castle at some point in the past. You grab your things.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What did we do up there?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Like just so much stuff there, so we've totally been there.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Did you have hickies afterward, or something?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: This would be the next action, yeah. Since you don’t have any disarm-based abilities, this is a more involved -

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go ahead and make... go ahead and make an attack roll - or no, for this one, let’s make an athletics check to try. It’s essentially a type of grapple.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 16. Okay, you reach out and manage to grab the Gilmore’s wrist, holding the dagger. His arm goes up and starts clawing these fingernails, these currently not-even-visible fingernails that all of a sudden turn into these large hooks that start tearing into your skin. Go ahead and make a strength check to see if you can wrestle the blade from his grasp.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And this is the next action?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Sharpshooter, okay. You have advantage on this shot, by the way, because of the Guiding Bolt that she did to him.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I’m going to run past her room towards the west, and do I have a view right there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You now have a view of a guy beaming with divine light, trying to pat out divine flames after swinging and getting a nice heavy wound on Pike, who looks like she’s barely standing.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I’m going to take a couple -

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Fuck him up. Fuck him up.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: If he takes care of you, though...

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I get one foot, stop, turn around. I draw my sword and I’m just going to go stabby on the bastard because I haven’t reloaded my gun yet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is the end of your movement.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, right there? Okay. Then fine, I’ll just unload the gun. That’ll be fun.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you have a fourth shot.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I have a fourth shot and then another one, yeah.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right, so you guys all make your way down. As you’re going through the castle, it’s in utter chaos now. All the guards who, in what was about 20 to 30 seconds of action since the moment of actual shouting at the top of the tower, the reaction time would be great if it wasn’t such a short window they had to get up there and you guys were right in the thick of it, and more trained than these soldiers.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: His dagger, the dagger - no, I’ve got your sword. And I toss it as we get dragged off. The dagger. Get the dagger for me!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I’ll grab the dagger. I’m coming with.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I go and I look for Allura and Gilmore.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yes, let them know what’s going on.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So you take Vax and Vex down towards the ziggurat.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Just make sure if you start to feel strange as we go down there, let us know. And we slowly inch towards the effects of it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: This is why I didn’t even bother to take it off.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You know what? At least it doesn’t smell as bad as your feathers.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Life’s not that bad. Life’s not that bad.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I’ll go, too, just as security.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Huh. I like you." And he walks out. "I'll meet you guys in a minute." And he goes off to clean himself up. Zahra's fine. There's been no attack on Zahra.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "They knew better, right? What else was going to happen?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I'll take a shower first. But then a drink."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I grab him real fast and say, "It was Hotis, the rakshasa. Remember? From the Slayer's Take."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I put out my hand and say, "I've heard a lot about you. It's nice to meet you."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I have a robe! I have on a robe!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: "I have on a robe, I have on a robe!"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We'll say he closes the front a little bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's probably way too large for you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "It's nice to meet you, too. I... don't normally dress like this, either, so don't worry."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm dressed like this all the time.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Since you're alive, its vengeance was not sated. I think that's two of you on its shit list."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, that will be vengeance on two, then. It will be back."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is there a way to prevent the "sha-ka-kan" from coming back?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Is there a way to finish it off for good?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "There are a couple of ways. All of them involve going to its home plane and destroying it there. So unless you marvel a trip to the Nine Hells, it's going to be a bit of paranoia for a while. It does take weeks, months for them to regain their form, but the process is very painful for them and, as far as what I've read, at least, they only really care about getting back at the ones that took it from them."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Is it one of those things where it passes off down the line, or is this rakshasa going to be pissed at both of them?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Well, for right now, it's screaming its way back to the pit of its own creation. It will take weeks, months before it reforms. It will be very vulnerable during that time. Mind you, it's not the most welcoming place, either. But (sighs) if we make a journey there in a few weeks' time, we could probably find where it's currently recouping, and slay it for good."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Is it one of those things where it passes off down the line, or is this rakshasa going to be pissed at both of them?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Since you're alive, its vengeance was not sated. I think that's two of you on its shit list."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Allura, would you be able to... give us guidance on how to get to it? I mean, this is a group decision, and I'm not going to be fooled in the same way again. I'm going to be sleeping with my fucking knives for a while. But this will just repeat. How do we get to it?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: He takes a minute and walks around you, looking at the armor up and down. Looking at you up and down a little bit. But mostly at the armor. His eyes flare a few times with arcane sparks. "This is a powerful Vestige, my friend. This has existed for quite some time, and you've - well, there's certainly a bit of dark divine energy around it. It looks like it has the capability to resist most elements when given the instruction, and it safeguards the life of the bearer and it looks like there's some sort of a - Tell you what. Follow me."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, wait, wait. Hey, hand that over, big guy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "(stuttering) I wouldn't say I know everything about everything."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And he motions toward Allura. "Pretty sure we know everything, but she more than I."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I can agree with that. We found this in a tomb.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: My fucking rock-hard pec. The ARMOR. I tap the armor, as you fucking very well knew, Laura Bailey. I kind of understand it. Can you tell anything about it?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Other than the fact that it smells really bad?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Shush, yeah, it does smell bad. Scanlan gave me some patchouli to rub on it, but it only does half the job. What can you tell me about it? It belonged to a god.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: And then time seems to pass for a minute and as you release him, the wings (fluttering sound) scatter into black feathers in the wind and disappear.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (shouting) You fucking brilliant bastard! Thank you. Thank you. (sighs) This is embarrassing. I float us back down.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can see he's a little nervous, but he's smiling. "(nervous laughter)"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Thank you. No, it's all right. I would have been fine."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You are a dear, dear friend. You are a dear friend. And I give him a big diagonal hug. A long, strong hug.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He freezes for a moment, still figuring out his boundaries with the dynamic being what it is, but eventually he gives in and you feel his arms take you in as well, and you guys have this long, honest, connecting hug. And as this happens, the wings also wrap around and envelop the both of you.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It's for up to an hour, it can last, just so you're aware. But once per day, you give yourself a fly speed of 60.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I follow her and I stop her and I give her a hug and I say,

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I love you. I love you. I love you. (whispering) And I'll be less of a fuckwit lately, I promise.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I love you, too. I'm glad you're not dead.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Keyleth has been in the door frame, watching all this happen. I'm in the door frame.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm slowly - I'm going to walk in and have a moment and look Vax over.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Hey, Shaun? Once in a while? All the time?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, that's once every dawn, that can return to you."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh. I'm glad I didn't push you off the cliff! I almost did. Wow, good to know.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughing) That would have been really funny.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. You shout out for about 10, 15 minutes or so before you hear a distant howl. (howl)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, shit! Shit. Tracking the guy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: By this time, some of the guards have come back, reporting that they haven't seen anything yet. There are folks that were following the tracks into the forest, but the tracks have mostly gone cold. Whoever it is knows how to not be found. It's part of their job.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You could spend the night tracking him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Or we could just drink. We know who the fucker was. We know who he's going back to.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We know he's going back to Stillben.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: To Spireling Veekar. We know where he's headed.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You guys are going to drink for a bit?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to go out past the wall and see if I can yell for the wolf.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I’m bringing a swath from one of the -

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: A few more moments pass before you hear (panting). Coming up from the outside of the forest, the large gray dark wolf. (padding footfalls)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You could spend the night tracking him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Or we could just drink. We know who the fucker was. We know who he's going back to.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We know he's going back to Stillben.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: To Spireling Veekar. We know where he's headed.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You guys are going to drink for a bit?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to go out past the wall and see if I can yell for the wolf.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I’m bringing a swath from one of the -

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You shout out for about 10, 15 minutes or so before you hear a distant howl. (howl)

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right. You all at these twilight hours find yourselves gathering your friends and allies for a long-needed drink until the sun begins to rise. You all appreciate the friendship that you’ve maintained, the survival of those that were endangered, and eventually find yourself, rather tipsy, finding your way back to bed, this time with quadruple the guards at the door -

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You guys are going to drink for a bit?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to go out past the wall and see if I can yell for the wolf.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I’m bringing a swath from one of the -

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You shout out for about 10, 15 minutes or so before you hear a distant howl. (howl)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: A few more moments pass before you hear (panting). Coming up from the outside of the forest, the large gray dark wolf. (padding footfalls)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There were six. Now there’s one. If you find him, we would be forever grateful.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "(licks chops)" Licks his deep, pearly-white bladed incisors and turns around and - "(grunts)" - takes off into the forest at triple-speed.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Now I’m going to go up and have a drink.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Triple-speed, damn. That’s a fast-ass wolf.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right. As time passes, eventually your sister, Allura, and Kima make their way towards you to go ahead and check in.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh. Like, the shits or the twirls?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The shits it's just one end, the other, both. North, south, all at the same time. It's like a relay race.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I know what you mean now. Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, I was just - you know, I might be crossing that threshold. And I jump into a side door -

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: - and send it out both sides. Two exits, no waiting.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: (dryly) Wow, I've never heard of that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You proudly hear, through the doorway.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: This happened to me when I was six, by the way. I'm talking about Liam, not Vax.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: If you've had the twirls, you never forget them.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: No. In fact, you spend probably a good 3 to 4 minutes pushing through Vax refuse while nobody else has thought to actually come and stop you when they've already figured out what the problem was.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Did Pike and I notice anything when we ripped out this darkness from his chest?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You gather that there was some curse that had taken hold of his body.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You gather, probably something to do with the rakshasa, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Grog, can I have your jug for a moment?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I just want to get some water.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Could I have some ass-water, please?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, no. Just regular water, Grog.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Jug fills up with clear, cool water.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Are you sure that won't make me throw up, as well?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There's no signs of poisoning in any of the remains, is there?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay, yeah. You actually find about 320 gold pieces on the body.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I light up my hands in defense.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You see step inside to the center of the castle, a very large, dark-furred wolf carrying something within his jaws.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Drops down on the ground another dark-cloaked figure.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He is not alive. There is a snapped neck on this individual.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can see a series of scrapes across the face. This person, as you go and inspect, had been rushing quickly through the forest and had taken a number of small injuries in the haste to escape. However, could not escape the ever-watching vigil.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I mean, we might as well let him keep his prize.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, it's all his. Check the body for bits and then the rest is his.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I want to check the body to see if I can find anything useful.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: When you take, essentially, 10 minutes to focus on the eye, you can scry as per the spell. But it can only be used for 10 minutes and it cannot be used until the next dawn.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, shit! I made something happen.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We'll stop by Gilmore's on our way back up to the front hall.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Allura, do you know what this is?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She takes a look at it. There's a little sparkle of arcane energy in her eyes again. You're starting to get the theme here. There is a specific spell that she's using to identify these objects. You've seen it done before. She takes a look at it and goes, "Well, I can see why this would be very useful for a member of the Clasp. It's a Scrying Eye."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And she throws it back to you.

payload.raw_text: Yeah, yeah. As you guys spend the rest of the afternoon - which, you woke up late, for the most part, so the afternoon's pretty short. But as the sun sets here in Whitestone, the cloud cover takes in once more, and a very light drizzle begins to hit the rooftops, and you hear in the distance people finishing rebuilding the roofs that were destroyed in the battle. Some buildings that are starting to be put back up again. The city is definitely, over time, coming back to life. You also know that throughout the day, you can see Allura and Gilmore and the Farseer Eskil are beginning to mark areas in the town. You're not sure what for, but you gather it's probably preparation for their wards they're going to start putting up throughout Whitestone. During this time, you make your first tinker check.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Don't lose sleep over it. Unless you really want to. But I don't want to force you into anything.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: This pains me. This pains me, and it must be put down. This must be put down and finished!

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: I'm going to roll a tinker check, at some point.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yeah, yeah. As you guys spend the rest of the afternoon - which, you woke up late, for the most part, so the afternoon's pretty short. But as the sun sets here in Whitestone, the cloud cover takes in once more, and a very light drizzle begins to hit the rooftops, and you hear in the distance people finishing rebuilding the roofs that were destroyed in the battle. Some buildings that are starting to be put back up again. The city is definitely, over time, coming back to life. You also know that throughout the day, you can see Allura and Gilmore and the Farseer Eskil are beginning to mark areas in the town. You're not sure what for, but you gather it's probably preparation for their wards they're going to start putting up throughout Whitestone. During this time, you make your first tinker check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And... I'm really nervous about this broom.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: (irritably) Do you see the giant mess in front of me right now?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This is the thing for your broom. I'm sitting here while you were drinking, working on this.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You will put a drink aside for me.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I will see you either later tonight, if this goes very - Actually, give me the broom. Just give me the broom.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I will either see you later tonight, or I will see you in the morning.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Don't lose sleep over it. Unless you really want to. But I don't want to force you into anything.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This pains me. This pains me, and it must be put down. This must be put down and finished!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to roll a tinker check, at some point.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yeah, you start making some decent headway. You get the stirrups well-bolted into the side, making sure not to interrupt any of the enchantment. You also begin to work on the finer elements of the seat portion of it, which in itself will have a gimbal hinge to adjust based on positioning, which will allow her to actually functionally sit on the seat. We'll get to that in a minute. The rest of you guys, anything else you're doing other than just drinking in the time you have left?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Roll to attach a Baby Bjorn?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 21? Okay. Working a good portion of the evening -

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's not my first roll at it, so, yeah.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right. As eventually, the fight dies down, another round of drinks are purchased by those who are involved. You all find yourselves now into the late, late hours. Once again, probably pushing another sunrise in the next hour or so. You gather you should probably find yourselves to rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: A giant brawl breaks out at this time.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You hear people laughing, and the music picks up more, and there's tables being tossed over. There's a hint of gingerness to it; no one's damaging the -

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Not the face. Not the face.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: - you can see, in general, in the city, there's a lot of tension to get out from previous events, and there are a few folks in this town, in this particular tavern that are enjoying throwing a couple of punches and taking a few, and there are some folks that are watching, and enjoying watching, this fight go down.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And while no one here can throw a punch to really give you much of an issue, Grog, it is fun to feel the energy again.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I sell them a bit more than they're worth. (all laugh)

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You guys make your way back to Whitestone castle. Find a full evening's sleep. Eventually, the late morning, early afternoon comes about. You're well-rested, and a night of good dreams come to you. In contrast to the bad night before, you do manage to get full rest. [no audio]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And while no one here can throw a punch to really give you much of an issue, Grog, it is fun to feel the energy again.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I sell them a bit more than they're worth. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. As eventually, the fight dies down, another round of drinks are purchased by those who are involved. You all find yourselves now into the late, late hours. Once again, probably pushing another sunrise in the next hour or so. You gather you should probably find yourselves to rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Sleep, then leave. Sleep, then leave.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I give Grog a big hug and say,

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I will. We're the original O.G., you know that?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, I guess original and O is redundant, but -

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Once everyone else is looking, she rights herself again. She takes her coat and buttons it there in the middle. "I cannot express, truly, how important your influence has been in this city, and I don't think you realize just how many lives here are for the better since you've walked into our humble home. And it is for that reason that I request, on the behalf of all of us here in Whitestone, that you come back safe. That is all. Good luck." She puts her shoulders back and walks back into the castle.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I know. I plan on coming back. I'm not done.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No, you're not." And she smacks you in the face. (dshh)

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Or two weeks from now, I guess.
